conditionThreshold.filter: metric.type="run.googleapis.com/request_count" AND resource.type="cloud_run_revision" AND resource.label.service_name="aaa-backend" AND metric.label.response_code_class="5xx"

documentation.content:
## aaa-backend 5xx Error Rate > 1%

The Cloud Run service is returning more than 1% 5xx errors over the last 5 minutes.

**Check logs:**
```
gcloud logging read 'resource.type=cloud_run_revision AND resource.labels.service_name=aaa-backend AND severity>=ERROR' --project=aaagents-oss --limit=50
```
